description: Weekly check of HighlightGPT Chrome Web Store public listing metrics.
command: npm run pi:print -- "Check the HighlightGPT Chrome Web Store listing metrics and append a snapshot to os/memory/observations/highlightgpt-$(date +%F).md. Track users, rating, ratings count, version, source URL, and any scrape/manual-verification issue. URL: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/highlightgpt-%E2%80%93-highlight/bdjccdhalfkaiolllkadcohhieboaain?authuser=0&hl=en&pli=1"

failure_policy.on_scrape_blocked: Record failure and mark manual verification required.
failure_policy.on_metric_missing: Do not overwrite previous metric; write null and add a note.
